description_long: This object is a modern touchscreen smartphone with a slim, rectangular profile and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy display with a black bezel, showing a digital clock, weather widget, and several app icons, as well as a prominent yellow flower wallpaper. The bottom front bezel displays the 'HTC' logo, and there are capacitive touch buttons for navigation. The device appears to have a metallic or brushed aluminum frame with a white finish along the sides, and small speaker or sensor openings are visible at the top and bottom edges. The phone's design is minimalist, with no visible external case or cover, and the screen dominates the front surface. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern HTC smartphone with a large glossy touchscreen, white metallic frame, and prominent front display featuring a yellow flower wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display, HTC logo, and navigation buttons.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness and white metallic edge of the phone.
description_view_2: Angled view from the top, showing the display, top edge details, and part of the front interface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thin white frame and edge details.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'HTC' logo is visible in white text, centered on the bottom front bezel below the screen.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock widget (11:31), weather information, a yellow flower wallpaper, and several app icons including phone, messages, and Google apps.
attribute_camera_placement: A single front-facing camera lens is visible on the top edge of the front face, to the left of the earpiece grille.
attribute_button_layout: Three capacitive touch buttons are located below the screen on the front bezel; no physical side or top buttons are visible in these views.
